name: DaVinci IQC
summary: A conduction dry-herb portable with a zirconia flavour chamber and replaceable battery, for patients who want flavour and control without the IQ3's price.
description: The DaVinci IQC takes the well-liked IQ2 formula and refines it. A zirconia flavour chamber keeps the vapour smooth and clean, and you get a broad temperature range, multiple heating modes, and a new precision mode for fine dosing. The 18650 battery is replaceable, so a worn cell is a cheap fix rather than a new device, and it carries a 5-year warranty. For a UK patient who wants honest flavour and proper control at a sensible price, the IQC sits in a sensible middle ground — conduction rather than convection, so a slower, steadier draw.
